properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I feel my Savior’s love In all the world around me. His Spirit warms my soul Through ev’rything I see.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He knows I will follow him, Give all my life to him. I feel my Savior’s love, The love he freely gives me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I feel my Savior’s love; Its gentleness enfolds me, And when I kneel to pray, My heart is filled with peace.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I feel my Savior’s love And know that he will bless me. I offer him my heart; My shepherd he will be.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I’ll share my Savior’s love By serving others freely. In serving I am blessed. In giving I receive.
